message:
Command `# Deep wait - monitor for up to 8 hours with 10-minute checks
# This runs in foreground and waits for LR PID 214817 to exit
SYNTH_LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/02-yosys-synthesis/yosys-synthesis.log"
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
MAIN_LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/wrapper_run.log"

echo "Waiting for LR PID 214817 — poll every 10 min (8h max)"
for i in $(seq 1 288); do
  sleep 600
  LINES=$(wc -l < "$SYNTH_LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  YTAIL=$(tail -1 "$SYNTH_LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  YOSYS=$(pgrep -f "yosys.*synthesize" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  LR=$(pgrep -f "librelane-wrapped" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] poll=$i LR=${LR:-DONE} Yosys=${YOSYS:-done} step=$STEP synth=$LINES lines | $YTAIL"
  if [ -z "$LR" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane exited! ==="
    break
  fi
done

echo ""
echo "=== FINAL: Run directory ==="
ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -20
echo ""
echo "=== FINAL: Last 60 lines of main log ==="
tail -60 "$MAIN_LOG"` executed with exit code -1.

SYNTH_LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/02-yosys-synthesis/yosys-synthesis.log"

echo "Waiting for LR PID 214817 — poll every 10 min (8h max)"
for i in $(seq 1 288); do
  sleep 600
  LINES=$(wc -l < "$SYNTH_LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  YTAIL=$(tail -1 "$SYNTH_LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  YOSYS=$(pgrep -f "yosys.*synthesize" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  LR=$(pgrep -f "librelane-wrapped" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] poll=$i LR=${LR:-DONE} Yosys=${YOSYS:-done} step=$STEP synth=$LINES lines | $YTAIL"
  if [ -z "$LR" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane exited! ==="
    break
  fi
done

echo ""
echo "=== FINAL: Run directory ==="
ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -20

function.name: execute_bash

content:
Command: "# Deep wait - monitor for up to 8 hours with 10-minute checks
# This runs in foreground and waits for LR PID 214817 to exit
SYNTH_LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/02-yosys-synthesis/yosys-synthesis.log"
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
MAIN_LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/wrapper_run.log"

echo "Waiting for LR PID 214817 — poll every 10 min (8h max)"
for i in $(seq 1 288); do
  sleep 600
  LINES=$(wc -l < "$SYNTH_LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  YTAIL=$(tail -1 "$SYNTH_LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  YOSYS=$(pgrep -f "yosys.*synthesize" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  LR=$(pgrep -f "librelane-wrapped" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] poll=$i LR=${LR:-DONE} Yosys=${YOSYS:-done} step=$STEP synth=$LINES lines | $YTAIL"
  if [ -z "$LR" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane exited! ==="
    break
  fi
done

echo ""
echo "=== FINAL: Run directory ==="
ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -20
echo ""
echo "=== FINAL: Last 60 lines of main log ==="
tail -60 "$MAIN_LOG"" timed out
